ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Salt, pure sea salt, no fortification

ingredients_text: Chicken Breast (33%), Brown Rice (27%), Tomato (12%), Water (7%), Capsicum (6%), Herbs & Spices (6%) (Parsley, Coriander, Saffron, Garlic, Paprika, Chilli Flakes, Oregano, Black Pepper), Chicken Mince (4%), Onion (4%), Olive Oil (1.5%), Lemon Juice (<1%), Corn Flour (<1%), Sea Salt (<1%), Chicken Stock Powder (<1%).
